title: PlayStation’s age-gating restrictions are coming to UK consoles - The Verge
summary_full: PlayStation’s age-gating restrictions are coming to UK consoles  The VergeSony begins rolling out age verification for PlayStation in UK and Ireland  GamesIndustry.bizPS5 owners will be locked out of certain features if they don't do this one thing soon  t3.comPlayStation will require age verification for messages and voice chat  TweakTownPlayStation age verification has begun rolling out across the UK and Ireland, with full implementation to be in place soon  Eurogamer.net
